meta.title: RummikubSolve
meta.description: Optimal Rummikub move solver — place as many tiles as possible.

page.resetConfirm: Reset everything? All tiles and sets will be cleared.

rulesPanel.runDesc: 3–13 tiles of the same color, in consecutive numbers (1–13). Jokers fill gaps.
rulesPanel.groupDesc: 3–4 tiles with the same number, each a different color. Jokers substitute missing colors.
rulesPanel.firstTurnDesc: Your initial meld must total ≥ 30 points (sum of face values of placed tiles). Board tiles may not be reused.
rulesPanel.jokerDesc: Substitutes any tile. Its value equals the tile it represents. You may retrieve a joker from the board by replacing it with the matching tile.

rack.heading: Your Rack
rack.empty: Click tiles above to add them to your rack.

errors.runColor: Run: all tiles must be the same color
errors.runJokers: Run: not enough jokers to fill gaps between tiles
errors.runRange: Run: tiles don't fit within the 1–13 range
errors.groupMax: Group: can have at most 4 tiles
errors.groupNumber: Group: all tiles must have the same number

solution.heading: Solution
solution.error: The solver returned an error. Check your board setup and try again.
solution.noSolutionFirstTurn: Hand value is below the 30-point threshold — no play possible this turn.
solution.noSolution: No valid move available — no tiles can be placed this turn.
solution.tilesPlaced: {count, plural, one {# tile placed} other {# tiles placed}}
solution.moveCreate: {count, plural, one {# new set} other {# new sets}}

errorBoundary.heading: Something went wrong displaying the result.
